# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-JOB-004](task-0060): Packet Runner

## Purpose

Implement packet runner.

## Scope

- Runner logic
- Execution
- Error handling

## Implementation

1. Implement runner
2. Add execution
3. Handle errors

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Runner works
2. Executes packets
3. Errors handled
